title: Meningitis: causes
body_html:
0 - 3 months
  • Group B Streptococcus (most common cause in neonates)
  • E. coli
  • Listeria monocytogenes

3 months - 6 years
  • Neisseria meningitidis
  • Streptococcus pneumoniae
  • Haemophilus influenzae

6 years - 60 years
  • Neisseria meningitidis
  • Streptococcus pneumoniae

> 60 years
  • Streptococcus pneumoniae
  • Neisseria meningitidis
  • Listeria monocytogenes

Immunosuppressed
  • Listeria monocytogenes
5
0
